text.title: templates Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for templates as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Leaving {placeholder} text in non-obvious fields after template fill (e.g., "Project: {project-name}").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents filling templates miss placeholder fields in metadata; run grep for '{' in generated docs before committing.

failure-mode.description: Agents filling templates often leave {placeholder} text in non-obvious fields (e.g., "Project: {project-name}").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Run grep for '{' in generated docs before committing.

failure-mode.description: The Implementation Plan template's Dependency Graph section is frequently left as freetext; agents do not auto-detect circular deps.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Validate the dependency graph manually before approving the plan.

failure-mode.description: Execution reports written by faion-sdd-executor-agent may not match the TASK_*.md template structure if the task file deviates.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Strict template adherence in task files prevents this; review all created tasks against the template.

failure-mode.description: "Est. tokens" fields in implementation plan tables are often optimistic by 30–50% in practice.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Add a review pass that stress-tests estimates against actual file sizes before committing to the plan.

failure-mode.description: The Roadmap template uses "Now / Next / Later" quarters; for long-lived projects this drifts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Prefer milestone labels over calendar quarters for long-lived projects.
